body.title: Add freshness signal to DB doc tree nodes
body.result: Added content_hash (MD5) + last_modified to docs_entries. _parse_dsb computes hash per entry. Upsert only bumps last_modified when content changes (CASE IS DISTINCT FROM). New 'changed-since' query subcommand. 6 tests. DB migrated live.
body.description: Add last_modified + content_hash fields to DB doc tree nodes to let context-load skip unchanged subtrees. REQUIRES Igor nap/migration.
